description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a prominent front porch supported by white columns and a paved driveway leading to the entrance. The facade is characterized by a symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors, with two palm trees planted in square cutouts in the front yard. The property includes a backyard area with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a large patio umbrella, as well as several mature trees providing shade around the perimeter. A car is parked in the driveway, and the overall landscaping is minimalistic yet elegant, with clean lines and open spaces. The exterior walls are finished in a dark color, contrasting with the white railings and columns. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with some wooden elements likely present in the porch and window frames.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a front porch with white columns, and a backyard pool area surrounded by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two palm trees, driveway, and the backyard pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the symmetrical front porch with white columns.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio umbrella, sun loungers, and additional trees.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the pool area, patio umbrella, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
